title: TwemojiChat
description: Client-side Twemoji emoji support for Minecraft. Type :shortcode: in chat to autocomplete and send emojis - other players without the mod see the shortcode as plain text.
body: # TwemojiChat TwemojiChat adds emoji autocomplete and Twemoji rendering to Minecraft chat. It is client-side only and works on any server. ## Features - Emoji shortcode autocomplete in chat - `Tab` and `Enter` both accept the current suggestion - Twemoji rendering for `:shortcode:` text and pasted Unicode emoji - Better Discord-style alias names like `:thumbs_up:` - Fabric, NeoForge, and Forge support
